item.title: 英伟达 GTC 主题演讲：黄仁勋发布「Token 帝国」
item.guid: 英伟达-GTC-主题演讲：黄仁勋发布「Token-帝国」
item.description:
Yesterday, Nvidia held the keynote speech for this year's GTC conference in San Jose, California, where CEO Jensen Huang spoke for nearly three hours, focusing on the core concept of "Agent" (intelligent entity). 昨天，英伟达在美国加利福尼亚州圣何塞举行了今年 GTC 大会的主题演讲，CEO 黄仁勋讲了近三小时，围绕「Agent」（智能体）这一核心。

🔗 Related reading: Just now, Nvidia's lobster appeared! Jensen Huang's controversial statements frequently emerged, with "people, cars, homes, heaven, earth, and chips" aiming for trillions in revenue. 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，英伟达龙虾登场！黄仁勋暴论频出，「人车家天地芯」冲击万亿收入

Vera Rubin Architecture Officially Unveiled: Vera Rubin 架构正式亮相：

    Covers seven chips, five rack systems, and a supercomputer specifically designed for AI Agents;

    The new Vera CPU is twice as efficient as traditional rack-mounted CPUs, with a 50% speed increase, and uses LPDDR5X memory;

    Rubin GPU integrates 288 GB of memory on a single chip, designed to support ultra-large language models and massive context KV caches;

    NVLink bandwidth doubles to 260 TB/s; the new Kyber rack connects 144 GPUs within a single domain via sixth-generation NVLink switches;

    High-end inference performance and throughput per megawatt both increase by 35 times; the entire system can generate 700 million tokens per second, which is 350 times that of the Hopper architecture from two generations ago.

OpenClaw Strategy: OpenClaw 战略：

    Jensen Huang likens OpenClaw to the Linux and HTML of this era, stating that "it has only been online for a few weeks, but its influence has already surpassed Linux's thirty years of accumulation." It is essentially an agent operating system. It can call large models, manage files, break down tasks, coordinate sub-agents, send emails, send text messages, and communicate with people in any modality;

    NVIDIA, in collaboration with OpenClaw founder Peter Steinberger, launched the enterprise-grade platform NemoClaw, which incorporates OpenShell technology, network protection mechanisms, and privacy routing capabilities, allowing enterprises to securely deploy agent systems in private environments, currently in Alpha stage;

    NVIDIA's open-source model product line covers multiple vertical domains: Nemotron focuses on language inference, Cosmos on world modeling, Groot on general robotics, BioNeMo on digital biology, and Earth-2 on AI physics simulation;

    Organizations such as Black Forest Labs, Cursor, LangChain, Mistral, Perplexity, and Thinking Machines, founded by Mira Murati, announced their participation in the joint R&D of Nemotron 4.

Data Centers Extend from Ground to Space: 数据中心从地面延伸至太空：

    Jensen Huang predicts that Blackwell and Rubin chips will generate at least $1 trillion in revenue by the end of next year , calling this a conservative estimate;

    Launched the NVIDIA DSX platform, based on Omniverse digital twin technology, which allows for comprehensive simulation of an entire AI factory before construction, combined with Max-Q technology to achieve dynamic adjustment of power consumption and computing power;

    After software optimization of the same hardware, token generation speed for service providers like Fireworks jumped from 700 tokens per second to nearly 5000, an increase of about 7 times;

    Thor chips have passed radiation resistance certification; NVIDIA is jointly developing the NVIDIA Space-1 Vera Rubin space computer with partners, aiming to build data centers directly in orbit;

    Jensen Huang admitted that space cooling is "very complex" but stated that NVIDIA has excellent engineers to tackle it.

Accelerated Deployment of Autonomous Driving and Robotics: 自动驾驶与机器人加速落地：

    NVIDIA and Uber announced a partnership yesterday, planning to deploy autonomous vehicles based on NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion platform in Los Angeles and San Francisco starting next year, and expanding to 28 cities globally by 2028, covering North America, Europe, Australia, and Asia;

    Vehicles will be equipped with NVIDIA Alpamayo AI inference models to handle complex road conditions, with deployment progressing from data collection vehicles to L4 fully autonomous driving operations;

    NVIDIA's RoboTaxi Ready platform has added four new car manufacturers: BYD, Geely, Isuzu, and Nissan. With Mercedes, Toyota, and General Motors already on board, the total annual production capacity of partner car manufacturers exceeds 18 million vehicles;

    In the field of industrial robots, NVIDIA has collaborated with companies such as ABB, Universal Robots, and KUKA; Caterpillar's inclusion means that heavy construction machinery is also beginning to integrate with physical AI systems;

To conclude the keynote speech, the Olaf robot from Disney's "Frozen" appeared on the GTC stage, engaging in a smooth dialogue and interaction with Jensen Huang. Huang stated that in the future, all characters in Disney theme parks will possess true intelligence, allowing for genuine interaction with visitors within the park. 主题演讲压轴，来自迪士尼《冰雪奇缘》的雪宝机器人登上 GTC 舞台，与黄仁勋完成流畅对话互动。黄仁勋表示，未来迪士尼乐园所有角色都将拥有真正的智能，可在园区内与游客展开真实互动。

Regarding gaming, NVIDIA announced DLSS 5, which integrates controllable 3D structured data with generative rendering via AI. It is expected to launch this autumn, optimized for the RTX 50 series Blackwell architecture. 游戏方面，英伟达发布 DLSS 5，通过 AI 将可控的 3D 结构化数据与生成式渲染融合，预计今年秋季开始推出，面向 RTX 50 系列 Blackwell 架构优化。

Launch titles include 3A blockbusters such as "Starfield," "Assassin's Creed Shadows," "Resident Evil Requiem," and "The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered." 首发游戏包括《星空》《刺客信条：影》《生化危机：安魂曲》《上古卷轴IV：湮灭重制版》等 3A 大作。

item.title: 苹果无预警发布 AirPods Max 2
item.guid: 苹果无预警发布-AirPods-Max-2
item.description:
Last night, Apple unexpectedly announced the release of AirPods Max 2, starting at 3999 yuan. 昨晚，苹果突然官宣发布 AirPods Max 2，起售价 3999 元。

The new generation adopts the H2 chip, with active noise cancellation officially stated to be 1.5 times better than its predecessor. It also adds adaptive audio, conversation awareness, and voice prominence, features that were previously missing from the Max. 新一代改用 H2 芯片，主动降噪官方称相比前代提升 1.5 倍，同时补上自适应音频、对话感知、语音突显这些此前 Max 一直缺席的功能。

Additionally, new creator-centric features such as studio-grade audio recording and camera remote control have been added. 此外，还新增了录音棚级音频录制、相机遥控等更偏创作者场景的能力。

In terms of sound quality, AirPods Max 2 supports 24-bit, 48kHz lossless audio, but requires the use of the included USB-C cable. 音质方面，AirPods Max 2 支持 24-bit、48kHz 无损音频，但需要配合随机附送的 USB-C 连接线使用。

AirPods Max 2 will be available in Midnight, Starlight, Orange, Purple, and Blue. Pre-orders will begin on March 25th, with sales starting early next month. AirPods Max 2 配色有午夜色、星光色、橙色、紫色和蓝色，将于 3 月 25 日开启预购，下月初发售。

item.title: 多家 AI 企业回应「AI 投毒」
item.guid: 多家-AI-企业回应「AI-投毒」
item.description:
According to reports from Jiemian News and China Newsweek, yesterday, several GEO-related companies successively issued compliance operation statements, responding to the issue of AI large models being "poisoned" exposed by CCTV's "3·15 Gala" in 2026. 据界面新闻、中新经纬报道，昨天，多家 GEO 相关企业相继发布合规经营声明，回应日前 2026 年央视「3·15 晚会」曝光了 AI 大模型遭「投毒」的问题。

    Henan Henghui Hehuan Network Technology Co., Ltd., an ecological partner of iFLYTEK, issued a self-regulatory statement, emphasizing adherence to "technology for good, compliance first," firmly opposing the use of GEO for illegal gray-area activities, and advocating for peers to jointly purify the AI and search ecosystem;

    Foreign trade B2B service provider ABKE stated its firm opposition to false advertising, data fabrication, and malicious manipulation of AI output results, explicitly stating that it does not participate in, develop, or provide illegal services such as "brainwashing AI," "manipulating standard answers," or "ranking boosts with one-week effectiveness";

    Nanjing Xiaoliebian Network Technology Co., Ltd. clarified in its statement that the GEO-related products mentioned in the "3·15 Gala" were not developed or operated by the company. Its GEO products are currently in internal testing, have not been fully commercialized, and have not authorized any third party for sale or agency.

    Its investor, Hangzhou Youzan Technology, stated that this investment has no equity, business, or technical association with GEO-related businesses.

According to previous CCTV reports, some organizations have used GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) technology to engage in illegal activities such as generating false information, poisoning AI data, manipulating rankings, and malicious competition, which has caused a strong reaction within the industry. 据此前央视报道，部分机构利用 GEO（生成式引擎优化）技术从事虚假信息生成、AI 数据投毒、排名操控、恶意竞争等违规行为，在行业内引发强烈反响。

item.title: vivo 官宣涨价
item.guid: vivo-官宣涨价
item.description:
Yesterday, vivo released "Explanation on the Adjustment of Suggested Retail Prices for Some vivo and iQOO Products," announcing that it will adjust the suggested retail prices of some products starting at 10:00 on March 18th (this Wednesday). Specific models and prices will be subject to the official channel product detail pages. 昨天，vivo 发布《关于 vivo 及 iQOO 部分产品建议零售价调整的说明》，宣布将于 3 月 18 日（本周三）10:00 起调整部分产品的建议零售价，具体机型及价格以官方渠道商品详情页为准。

vivo is not the first mobile phone brand to announce price increases. vivo 并非首个宣布涨价的手机品牌。

Following Samsung's S26 series price increase of 1000 yuan, OPPO was the first to issue an announcement on March 10th, stating that it would adjust the prices of some of its already released products. The affected models include the A series, K series, and OnePlus, but do not include the Find series, Reno series, and OPPO Pad series. 继三星 S26 系列上调售价 1000 元之后，OPPO 于 3 月 10 日率先发布公告，宣布将对旗下部分已发售产品进行价格调整，涉及机型包括 A 系列、K 系列以及一加，但不包含 Find 系列、Reno 系列及 OPPO Pad 系列。

Xiaomi and Honor have also successively released signals of price adjustments. Honor's new generation foldable flagship, the Magic V6, released on March 10th, saw both its 16+512GB and 16+1TB versions increase in price by 1000 yuan compared to the same memory versions of the previous generation Magic V5, an increase of approximately 10%. 小米和荣耀也已相继释放调价信号。荣耀于 3 月 10 日发布的新一代折叠屏旗舰 Magic V6，16+512GB 和 16+1TB 版本均较上代 Magic V5 同内存版本提价 1000 元，涨幅约 10%。

item.title: 雷军剧透新一代小米 SU7 配置：全系标配激光雷达
item.guid: 雷军剧透新一代小米-SU7-配置：全系标配激光雷达
item.description:
Yesterday, Lei Jun announced on Weibo that the new generation Xiaomi SU7 will be officially released at 7 PM this Thursday, and "teased" the new car's related configurations, which have significantly improved in terms of safety, handling, intelligent experience, and luxurious quality, making its "product power extremely strong." 昨天，雷军在微博宣布，新一代小米 SU7 将于本周四晚 7 点正式发布，并「剧透」新车相关配置，在安全、驾控、智能体验与豪华质感方面均有巨大提升，「产品力非常强悍」。

    All models feature long range, with the Pro version having a CLTC range of 902 kilometers;

    All models feature fast charging and a silicon carbide high-voltage platform;

    All models come standard with the V6s Plus super motor;

    All models feature a major chassis upgrade, with wide rear tires and fixed calipers across the range;

    All models come standard with lidar and full-featured assisted driving;

    All models come standard with 2200MPa Xiaomi ultra-strong steel;

    All models feature upgraded battery safety, with hardcore thermal protection and omnidirectional hardcore physical protection across the range;

    All models come standard with 9 airbags;

    All models come standard with triple redundant door handles, complying with the new national standard ahead of time;

    All models feature upgraded seat comfort;

    All models come standard with silent double-layer laminated glass;

    All models achieve industry-leading levels of sun protection and heat insulation.

It is reported that the new generation Xiaomi SU7 includes three models, with a pre-sale price range of 229,900 to 309,900 yuan. Lei Jun previously stated publicly that due to rising costs, the new car "will definitely increase in price." 据悉，新一代小米 SU7 共含三款车型，预售价区间为 22.99 万至 30.99 万元。雷军此前曾公开表示，由于成本上升，新车「肯定会涨价」。

This Xiaomi Spring New Product Launch event will also simultaneously release two new products: Xiaomi Book Pro 14 and Xiaomi Watch S5. 此次小米春季新品发布会还将同步发布 Xiaomi Book Pro 14 与 Xiaomi Watch S5 两款新品。

item.title: 追觅芯际穿越「瑶台」算力基站发射成功
item.guid: 追觅芯际穿越「瑶台」算力基站发射成功
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, yesterday, Dreame Interstellar Crossing's first "Yaotai" computing power base station was successfully launched into space aboard the Kuaizhou-11 Y7 carrier rocket from the Jiuquan Satellite Launch Center. 据界面新闻报道，昨天，追觅芯际穿越公司首个「瑶台」算力基站搭载快舟十一号遥七运载火箭，在酒泉卫星发射中心成功发射升空。

This computing power base station is deployed within an optical remote sensing satellite and is expected to conduct systematic tests in a sun-synchronous orbit approximately 561 kilometers above the Earth's surface, aiming to verify its system's extreme capabilities in a space environment. 该算力基站部署于光学遥感卫星之中，预期在距地球表面约 561 千米的太阳同步轨道开展系统性测试，旨在验证其在太空环境下的系统极限能力。

Previously, Dreame Interstellar Crossing announced at the AWE exhibition its plan to build a space supercomputing center, intending to deploy 2 million computing power satellites to meet the growing demand for computing power in the AI era. This launch marks the first substantial step in implementing this plan. 此前，追觅芯际穿越在 AWE 展上宣布，计划建设太空超级算力中心，拟部署 200 万颗算力卫星，以满足 AI 时代日益增长的算力需求。此次发射是该计划落地的首个实质性步骤。

item.title: 徕卡相机将换帅，新 CEO 来自瑞士奢侈品牌万国表
item.guid: 徕卡相机将换帅，新-CEO-来自瑞士奢侈品牌万国表
item.description:
Leica Camera AG announced yesterday that Andreas Voll will officially take over as CEO on April 1st, succeeding Matthias Harsch, who has been at the helm since 2017. 徕卡相机公司（Leica Camera AG）昨天宣布，安德烈亚斯·沃尔（Andreas Voll）将于 4 月 1 日正式出任 CEO，接替自 2017 年起掌舵的马蒂亚斯·哈施（Matthias Harsch）。

Voll, 44, has extensive experience in the luxury goods industry and strategic management. Early in his career, he worked for the consulting firm Roland Berger, then spent 15 years at the Swiss luxury watch brand IWC Schaffhausen, eventually rising to Chief Operating Officer (COO). In 2023, he briefly served as CEO of the industrial fastener company Fischer Group. 沃尔现年 44 岁，在奢侈品行业与战略管理领域拥有丰富履历。他职业生涯早期曾供职于咨询公司罗兰贝格（Roland Berger），随后在瑞士奢侈腕表品牌万国表（IWC Schaffhausen）工作长达 15 年，最终晋升为首席运营官（COO）。2023 年，他短暂出任工业紧固件企业 Fischer Group 的 CEO。

Leica's major shareholder and Supervisory Board Chairman Andreas Kaufmann stated that Volle was chosen for his international management experience, especially his brand operation and business development capabilities in the field of high-end technology products. This appointment is clearly positioned by the company as a manifestation of its leadership "youthfulness" strategy. 徕卡大股东、监事会主席安德烈亚斯·考夫曼（Andreas Kaufmann）表示，选择沃尔是看中其国际化管理经验，尤其是在高端科技产品领域的品牌运营与企业发展能力。此次任命被公司明确定位为领导层「年轻化」战略的体现。

Volle himself stated that it is a "great honor" to lead this iconic company. It is reported that his strategic focus after taking office will include the expansion of digital and networked imaging solutions, the strengthening of high-end product lines, and the layout of global sales and retail networks, including plans to open new stores in cities such as Chicago and Houston in the United States. 沃尔本人表示，能够执掌这家标志性企业是「莫大的荣誉」。据悉，他上任后的战略重心将涵盖数字化与网络化影像解决方案的拓展、高端产品线的强化，以及全球销售与零售网络的布局，其中包括在美国芝加哥、休斯顿等城市开设新门店的计划。

item.title: 阿里成立 Token Hub 事业群，CEO 吴泳铭亲自挂帅押注 AI Agent 时代
item.guid: 阿里成立-Token-Hub-事业群，CEO-吴泳铭亲自挂帅押注-AI-Agent-时代
item.description:
Yesterday, Alibaba officially announced the establishment of the Alibaba Token Hub (ATH) business group, directly led by CEO Eddie Wu, with the core objectives of "creating Tokens, delivering Tokens, and applying Tokens," to comprehensively advance the implementation of Alibaba's AI strategy. 昨天，阿里巴巴正式宣布成立 Alibaba Token Hub（ATH）事业群，由 CEO 吴泳铭直接负责，以「创造 Token、输送 Token、应用 Token」为核心目标，全面推进阿里 AI 战略落地。

The ATH business group encompasses Tongyi Lab, MaaS business line, Qianwen Business Unit, Wukong Business Unit, and AI Innovation Business Unit, covering a complete layout from basic model research and development, model service platforms, to AI applications for individuals and enterprises. ATH 事业群涵盖通义实验室、MaaS 业务线、千问事业部、悟空事业部及 AI 创新事业部，覆盖从基础模型研发、模型服务平台，到个人与企业端 AI 应用的完整布局。

Eddie Wu stated in an internal announcement that we are currently on the eve of an AGI explosion, where "a large amount of digital work will be supported by tens of billions of AI Agents," and Tokens will become the main carrier for human interaction with the digital world. 吴泳铭在内部公告表示，当下正处于 AGI 爆发前夜，「大量数字化工作将由数以百亿计的 AI Agent 来支撑」，而 Token 将成为人类与数字世界交互的主要载体。

In this adjustment, the Wukong Business Unit has entered the public eye for the first time, positioned as a "B-side AI-native work platform that deeply integrates model capabilities into enterprise workflows." This means that in addition to the Qianwen APP for individual users, Alibaba will simultaneously focus on the enterprise-level AI application market, forming a dual-line strategy for both C-end and B-end. 此次调整中，悟空事业部首次进入公众视野，定位为「B 端 AI 原生工作平台，将模型能力深度融入企业工作流」。这意味着，除面向个人用户的千问 APP 之外，阿里巴巴将同步重点布局企业级 AI 应用市场，形成 C 端与 B 端双线并进的格局。

Tongyi Lab is responsible for pursuing the upper limits of basic model capabilities, providing leading models for the group and the industry; the MaaS business line focuses on building an efficient and open model service platform to support the entire industry's AI ecosystem; and the AI Innovation Business Unit undertakes the function of exploring new models and rapidly validating new markets. 通义实验室负责追求基础模型能力上限，为集团及业界提供领先模型；MaaS 业务线则专注构建高效开放的模型服务平台，支撑全行业 AI 生态；AI 创新事业部则承担探索新模式、快速验证新市场的职能。

item.title: 三星三折叠将停售，只卖了三个月
item.guid: 三星三折叠将停售，只卖了三个月
item.description:
According to Android Authority, Samsung plans to stop selling the Galaxy Z TriFold in South Korea starting today (March 17). South Korean media "Dong-A Ilbo" cited industry sources saying that this tri-fold screen phone has only been on sale for about three months since its release last December. 据 Android Authority 报道，三星计划今天（3 月 17 日）起停止 Galaxy Z TriFold 在韩国本土的销售。韩国媒体《东亚日报》援引业内消息人士称，这款三折叠屏手机自去年 12 月发布至今，在售时间仅约三个月。

The domestic starting price of the Galaxy Z TriFold is 19,999 yuan, and it is sold in limited small batches through the official website, with restocks every one to two weeks, often selling out within minutes of each release. Galaxy Z TriFold 国内起售价 19999 元，通过官网以小批量方式限量发售，每隔一两周补货一次，每次开售往往数分钟内售罄。

Despite strong market demand, high production costs remain a core factor limiting continuous sales. The report points out that the continuous rise in prices of key components such as DRAM, NAND flash memory, and mobile processors has further squeezed Samsung's profit margins, making large-scale production unsustainable. 尽管市场需求旺盛，但高昂的生产成本仍是制约持续销售的核心因素。报道指出，DRAM、NAND 闪存及移动处理器等关键零部件价格持续上涨，进一步压缩了三星的利润空间，使得大批量生产难以为继。

After sales cease in the Korean market, sales in other regions may also gradually conclude. The device is currently shown as out of stock on Samsung's US official website, but Samsung plans to continue selling the remaining inventory in the US market until existing production capacity stock is depleted. 韩国市场停售后，其他地区的销售也可能陆续收尾。目前该机在三星美国官网已显示缺货，但三星计划将剩余库存继续在美国市场销售，直至现有产能库存耗尽。

item.title: 蚂蚁灵波与乐聚机器人官宣战略合作
item.guid: 蚂蚁灵波与乐聚机器人官宣战略合作
item.description:
Yesterday, Ant Lingbo Technology and Leju Robotics signed a strategic cooperation agreement. At the signing ceremony, Zhu Xing, CEO of Ant Lingbo Technology, and Chang Lin, CEO of Leju Robotics, jointly witnessed the signing of the agreement. 昨天，蚂蚁灵波科技与乐聚机器人签署战略合作协议。签约仪式上，蚂蚁灵波科技 CEO 朱兴与乐聚机器人 CEO 常琳共同见证了协议签署。

According to the agreement, both parties will subsequently leverage Ant Lingbo's technical capabilities in embodied large models and Leju's accumulation in ontology, data, and scenarios to jointly build high-value embodied AI real-machine datasets, carry out model training, optimization iterations, and ontology adaptation, continuously enhancing the robot's full-chain capabilities in "perception, understanding, decision-making, execution, and learning." 根据协议，双方后续将依托蚂蚁灵波在具身大模型方面的技术能力与乐聚在本体、数据、场景方面的积累，共同构建高价值具身智能真机数据集，开展模型训练、优化迭代与本体适配，持续提升机器人「感知、理解、决策、执行、学习」全链路能力。

item.title: 腾讯元宝派接入龙虾
item.guid: 腾讯元宝派接入龙虾
item.description:
Tencent Yuanbao App announced yesterday that its AI social feature "Yuanbao Pai" officially supports integration with OpenClaw. Users can bind local or cloud-based OpenClaw with Yuanbao Pai through three methods: running commands, manual configuration, or scanning a QR code. 腾讯元宝 App 昨日宣布，旗下 AI 社交功能「元宝派」正式支持接入 OpenClaw。用户可通过运行命令、手动配置、扫码关联三种方式，将本地或云端的 OpenClaw 与元宝派绑定。

After the association is complete, the user's OpenClaw will generate an exclusive Bot within the Pai, which can then be added to different Pais. A single Pai supports multiple Bots simultaneously, and Bots can also interact with each other based on user commands. 关联完成后，用户的 OpenClaw 将在派内生成专属 Bot，并可将其加入不同的派。单个派支持多个 Bot 同时接入，Bot 之间还可依据用户指令相互互动。

Furthermore, Yuanbao Pai will soon launch a limited-time free "One-Click Create" OpenClaw event, allowing users to directly create and enable an exclusive Bot within the Pai without cloud configuration or plugin installation. 此外，元宝派近期还将推出限量免费「一键创建」OpenClaw 活动，用户无需进行云端配置或安装插件，即可在派内直接创建并启用专属 Bot。

item.title: 拓竹科技与泡泡玛特达成和解，Labubu 3D 打印模型全面下架
item.guid: 拓竹科技与泡泡玛特达成和解，Labubu-3D-打印模型全面下架
item.description:
Bambu Lab and Pop Mart jointly announced yesterday that they have held friendly consultations and reached a settlement regarding Pop Mart IP copyright issues on the MakerWorld platform, and the problematic content has been fully removed. 拓竹科技与泡泡玛特昨日联合宣布，双方就 MakerWorld 平台涉及泡泡玛特 IP 版权的相关问题已进行友好磋商并达成和解，相关问题内容已全面下架。

Users of Bambu Lab's 3D model community MakerWorld had previously uploaded 3D printable model files of Pop Mart's iconic IP "Labubu" figures, allowing other users to download and print products highly similar to the original for free. 拓竹旗下 3D 模型社区 MakerWorld 用户曾上传泡泡玛特标志性 IP「Labubu」手办的 3D 打印模型文件，其他用户可免费下载并打印出与原版高度相似的产品。

It is reported that Pop Mart's legal team had sent two letters to Bambu Lab in May and October 2025, respectively, to communicate platform infringement issues, until formally filing a lawsuit earlier this year, suing Bambu Lab and its affiliated companies for copyright ownership and infringement disputes. Currently, the dispute between the two parties has temporarily concluded with a settlement. 据悉，泡泡玛特法务团队曾分别于 2025 年 5 月、10 月两次致函拓竹科技沟通平台侵权问题，直至今年初正式提起诉讼，以著作权权属、侵权纠纷为由起诉拓竹科技及其关联企业。目前，双方纠纷以和解形式暂告一段落。

item.title: 曝生命科学公司百图生科赴港上市，李彦宏牵头成立
item.guid: 曝生命科学公司百图生科赴港上市，李彦宏牵头成立
item.description:
According to Yicai, BioMap, an AI large model company in life sciences, has secretly submitted a listing application to the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, planning to raise hundreds of millions of US dollars. 据第一财经报道，生命科学 AI 大模型公司百图生科（BioMap）已秘密向港交所递交上市申请，计划募资数亿美元。

Sources revealed that BioMap is collaborating with CICC, Morgan Stanley, and UBS Group to prepare for this listing, but relevant discussions are still ongoing, and details such as fundraising scale and listing timetable remain subject to change. 消息人士透露，百图生科正与中金公司、摩根士丹利和瑞银集团合作筹备此次上市，但相关讨论仍在进行中，集资规模及上市时间表等细节尚存变数。

BioMap was co-founded in 2020 by Baidu co-founder Robin Li and former Baidu Ventures CEO Liu Wei, with Robin Li personally serving as chairman. 百图生科由百度联合创始人李彦宏与百度风投前 CEO 刘维于 2020 年共同创立，李彦宏亲自出任董事长。

Its flagship product, BioMap OS, is a large-model-driven life science discovery system, which, according to the company, has been validated in over 60 PoC projects, covering areas such as new target discovery, antibody research and development, and innovative drug research and development. 其旗舰产品 BioMap OS 是一套大模型驱动的生命科学发现系统，据公司称已在超过 60 个 PoC 项目中得到验证，涵盖新靶点发现、抗体研发及创新药物研发等领域。

item.title: 💡 初创公司首席产品官：不用 Vibe Coding 的员工「很可能不会继续留在公司」
item.guid: 💡-初创公司首席产品官：不用-Vibe-Coding-的员工「很可能不会继续留在公司」
item.description:
According to Business Insider, Geoff Charles, Chief Product Officer at fintech startup Ramp, stated on the podcast 'Behind the Craft' that employees who do not use AI-assisted programming tools are falling behind their colleagues. 据《商业内幕》报道，金融科技初创公司 Ramp 的首席产品官 Geoff Charles 在播客节目「Behind the Craft」中表示，不使用 AI 辅助编程工具的员工正在落后于同事。

If you're not using Claude Code this year, no matter what your role, you're likely performing worse than others in the company.

Ramp is an AI fintech company valued at $32 billion, focused on helping businesses manage bill payments. Charles revealed that 50% of the company's code is currently AI-generated, and this proportion is expected to reach 80% by March this year. Ramp 是一家估值达 320 亿美元、专注于帮助企业管理账单支付的 AI 金融科技公司。Charles 透露，该公司目前有 50% 的代码由 AI 生成，预计到今年 3 月这一比例将达到 80%。

Charles categorizes employees' AI usage capabilities into four levels: Charles 将员工的 AI 使用能力划分为四个层级：

    L0 refers to employees who 'occasionally use ChatGPT,' representing the lowest tier;

    L1 refers to employees who have built custom GPTs and have some experience using Claude Code;

    L2 refers to employees who can skillfully use 'Vibe Coding' to build applications and automate workflows;

    L3 is the highest tier, the 'system builder'.

He stated bluntly that employees still at L0 'are very likely not to remain with the company,' adding: 'If you lack self-motivation and a growth mindset, training will be very, very difficult.' 他直言，仍停留在 L0 的员工「很可能不会继续留在公司」，并补充道：「如果你没有自驱力，也没有成长心态，培训起来会非常非常困难。」

item.title: 智谱发布 GLM-5-Turbo，龙虾场景国产第一
item.guid: 智谱发布-GLM-5-Turbo，龙虾场景国产第一
item.description:
Yesterday, Zhipu released the GLM-5-Turbo model, positioned as an 'Agent-native' foundational model, specifically optimized for OpenClaw Lobster Agent scenarios. 昨天，智谱发布了 GLM-5-Turbo 模型，定位「Agent 原生」基座模型，专为 OpenClaw 龙虾 Agent 场景深度优化而生。

The core improvements of GLM-5-Turbo focus on four capabilities: the stability of Tool Calling, the understanding and decomposition of complex instructions (Instruction Following), the execution of timed and continuous tasks, and the overall efficiency of high-throughput long-chain tasks. GLM-5-Turbo 的核心改进集中在四项能力上：工具调用（Tool Calling）的稳定性、复杂指令的理解与拆解（Instruction Following）、定时与持续性任务的执行，以及高吞吐长链路任务的整体效率。

Zhipu also released its self-developed end-to-end benchmark for lobster scenarios, ZClawBench. The results show that GLM-5-Turbo achieved the top ranking among domestic models on this benchmark, with significant improvements compared to the previous generation GLM-5. 智谱同步发布了自研龙虾场景端到端基准 ZClawBench，结果显示，GLM-5-Turbo 在该基准上取得国产模型第一的成绩，相较上一代 GLM-5 提升显著。

GLM-5-Turbo has been integrated into the Mechanical Revolution Box under iSoftStone, becoming the world's first 'Lobster Box' to integrate a GLM model, focusing on a native AI Agent terminal experience. GLM-5-Turbo 已接入软通动力旗下机械革命盒子，成为全球首款接入 GLM 模型的「龙虾盒子」，主打原生 AI Agent 终端体验。

It is worth noting that Zhipu also increased the API price of GLM-5-Turbo by 20% simultaneously with the release of the new model. According to Yicai, this is Zhipu's second price increase recently. A rough calculation shows that Zhipu's API prices have cumulatively increased by approximately 83% in the first quarter of this year. 值得注意的是，智谱在发布新模型的同时还上调了 GLM-5-Turbo 的 API 价格，涨幅达 20%。据第一财经报道，本次为智谱近期的第二次涨价。粗略计算，今年第一季度智谱 API 价格已累计上涨约 83%。

🔗 Related reading: 🦞 Shrimp riding a horse! The anonymous model that has been circulating in the lobster community for a week, it turns out to be this one | With the latest experience details 🔗 相关阅读： 🦞虾骑马！龙虾圈传了一周的匿名模型，原来是它｜附最新体验细节

item.title: 通义实验室开源首个影视级 AI 配音多模态大模型 Fun-CineForge
item.guid: 通义实验室开源首个影视级-AI-配音多模态大模型-Fun-CineForge
item.description:
Yesterday, Tongyi Lab released and open-sourced Fun-CineForge, the first multimodal large model supporting film and television-grade multi-scene dubbing. 昨天，通义实验室发布并开源了首个支持影视级多场景配音的多模态大模型 Fun-CineForge。

Fun-CineForge is built upon Tongyi Lab's self-developed CosyVoice3 speech synthesis underlying capabilities. It can receive silent video clips, dubbing text, character attributes and emotional cues, time information, and reference audio as input, and output synthesized speech highly aligned with the video footage. Fun-CineForge 基于通义实验室自研的 CosyVoice3 语音合成底层能力构建，能够接收无声视频片段、配音文本、角色属性与情感线索、时间信息及参考语音作为输入，输出与视频画面高度对齐的合成语音。

Officially, Fun-CineForge is claimed to outperform existing open-source dubbing models in multiple key metrics such as speech naturalness, word error rate, emotional expression, timbre similarity, lip synchronization, time alignment, and instruction following. 官方宣称，Fun-CineForge 在语音自然度、字错率、情感表达、音色相似度、唇形同步、时间对齐及指令遵循等多项关键指标上均优于现有开源配音模型。

💻 GitHub: https://github.com/FunAudioLLM/FunCineForge 💻 GitHub： https://github.com/FunAudioLLM/FunCineForge

🤗 HuggingFace: https://huggingface.co/FunAudioLLM/Fun-CineForge 🤗 HuggingFace： https://huggingface.co/FunAudioLLM/Fun-CineForge

👾 ModelScope: https://www.modelscope.cn/models/FunAudioLLM/Fun-CineForge/ 👾 ModelScope： https://www.modelscope.cn/models/FunAudioLLM/Fun-CineForge/

item.title: AMD 推出两款龙虾主机：本地跑大模型，但价格不便宜
item.guid: AMD-推出两款龙虾主机：本地跑大模型，但价格不便宜
item.description:
AMD recently released two reference host solutions for local AI inference, RyzenClaw and RadeonClaw, as part of its "Agent Computer" initiative. AMD 日前发布了两款面向本地 AI 推理的参考主机方案 RyzenClaw 与 RadeonClaw，作为其「智能体计算机」（Agent Computer）计划的组成部分。

RyzenClaw: RyzenClaw：

    Equipped with a Ryzen AI Max+ 395 processor, paired with 128GB of unified memory;

    When running the Qwen 3.5 35B A3B model, this solution's generation speed is approximately 45 Tokens per second, processing 10,000 Tokens of input takes about 19.5 seconds, and the maximum context window reaches 260K Tokens;

    Can run up to 6 local AI agents simultaneously, suitable for multi-agent workflows and agent cluster experimental scenarios.

RadeonClaw: RadeonClaw：

    Equipped with a Radeon AI PRO R9700 workstation graphics card, providing 32GB of dedicated video memory;

    When also running the Qwen 3.5 35B A3B model, the inference speed is significantly increased to approximately 120 Tokens per second, processing 10,000 Tokens of input in only about 4.4 seconds;

    However, there are trade-offs compared to RyzenClaw: the maximum context window is narrowed to 190K Tokens, and the number of concurrent agents is reduced to 2.

AMD states that the future of AI should not be locked in remote data centers, and users should control their own data and computing environments to reduce reliance on cloud AI services and alleviate privacy concerns. AMD 表示，AI 的未来不应被锁死在远程数据中心，用户应当掌控自己的数据与算力环境，从而降低对云端 AI 服务的依赖，并缓解隐私方面的顾虑。

It is worth noting that the pricing of these two reference hosts is not consumer-friendly. RyzenClaw starts at over $2700; RadeonClaw also requires an additional purchase of a Radeon AI PRO R9700 graphics card, retailing for approximately $1299, making the overall cost higher. 值得注意的是，这两款参考主机的定价并不亲民。RyzenClaw 起步价超过 2700 美元；RadeonClaw 还需额外购置零售价约 1299 美元的 Radeon AI PRO R9700 显卡，总体成本更高。

item.title: 胖东来回应鸡蛋超标：检测无误将起诉相关自媒体
item.guid: 胖东来回应鸡蛋超标：检测无误将起诉相关自媒体
item.description:
Pang Dong Lai recently responded to the "eggs detected with canthaxanthin" controversy, stating that the company immediately conducted a self-inspection. All fresh eggs in its stores are sourced through legitimate channels, suppliers have complete qualifications, and its own testing center conducts weekly random checks and publicizes results, with all past tests meeting national standards. 胖东来近日就「鸡蛋检出角黄素」争议发布回应称，公司已第一时间开展自查，卖场鲜鸡蛋均通过正规渠道采购，供应商资质完备，自有检测中心每周抽检并公示结果，过往检测均符合国家标准。

The incident began with a video posted by a blogger, whose submitted samples of several fresh egg brands sold by Pang Dong Lai all tested positive for artificial canthaxanthin (cantaxanthine). Among them, the "Ye Ji Ming (Pine Forest Free-Range) Selenium-Enriched Egg" had a detected value of 9.54 mg/kg, which is higher than the maximum allowed addition of 8 mg/kg in poultry feed according to the "Specifications for Safe Use of Feed Additives". 事件起于某博主发布的视频，其送检的胖东来售卖的多款鲜鸡蛋均检出人工角黄素（斑蝥黄），其中「野迹鸣（松林散养）富硒蛋」检测值为 9.54 mg/kg，高于《饲料添加剂安全使用规范》中蛋禽类饲料允许的最大添加量 8 mg/kg。

Currently, market regulatory authorities have intervened in the investigation, inspecting the compliance of the store's egg procurement and sampling multiple brands of fresh eggs for testing. Pang Dong Lai has also simultaneously initiated a comprehensive re-inspection, awaiting third-party test results. 目前，市场监管部门已介入调查，对卖场鸡蛋采购合规性进行检查，并对多品牌鲜鸡蛋抽样送检；胖东来也同步启动全面复检，等待第三方检测结果。

Pang Dong Lai stated that if quality issues are ultimately confirmed, products will be immediately removed from shelves, recalled, and the company will bear all legal responsibilities. If tests show no issues, the company will legally defend its rights and pursue infringement liability against relevant individuals, self-media, and platforms. 胖东来表示，若最终确认产品存在质量问题，将立即下架召回并承担全部法律责任；若检测无误，将依法维权，追究相关个人、自媒体及平台的侵权责任。

item.title: 刘文祥麻辣烫发致歉信
item.guid: 刘文祥麻辣烫发致歉信
item.description:
Yesterday, Liu Wenxiang Malatang brand's official account issued an apology letter, admitting that some of its brand partner stores had issues with using inferior ingredients and failing to meet quality standards, and announced the launch of a comprehensive rectification plan. 昨天，刘文祥麻辣烫品牌官方账号发布致歉信，承认旗下部分品牌合作门店存在食材以次充好、品质不达标的问题，并宣布启动全面整改计划。

In the apology letter, Liu Wenxiang stated that the "localized ingredient procurement" model, which allows franchised stores to purchase ingredients, frozen products, and meat locally, was originally intended to reduce franchisees' operating costs and cater to local tastes. However, some stores, driven by profit, relaxed their standards in the ingredient procurement process, even purchasing ingredients of unknown origin and substandard quality. 致歉信中，刘文祥表示推行「本地化食材采购」模式，允许加盟店在当地自行采购食材、冻品及肉类，初衷是降低加盟商运营成本并贴合本地口味。但部分门店受利益驱使，在食材采购环节放松标准，甚至采购来源不明、品质不合格的食材。

Previously, Liu Wenxiang stores in multiple locations were exposed for serious issues of substituting inferior ingredients, with both delivery platforms and staff claiming the ingredients were beef or pork, when in fact most of the raw materials were duck meat. The related topic once trended on Weibo. 此前，多地刘文祥门店被曝存在严重的食材以次充好问题，外卖平台和店员都宣称是牛肉、猪肉，实际上原材料大多为鸭肉，相关话题一度登上微博热搜。

item.title: 奥斯卡 2026 完整获奖名单揭晓
item.guid: 奥斯卡-2026-完整获奖名单揭晓
item.description:
The 98th Academy Awards ceremony was held yesterday at the Dolby Theatre in Hollywood, with Paul Thomas Anderson's "One Battle after Another" becoming the biggest winner of the night, taking home a total of 6 awards: Best Picture, Best Director, Best Supporting Actor (Sean Penn), Best Adapted Screenplay, Best Editing, and Best Casting. 第 98 届奥斯卡颁奖典礼于昨日在好莱坞杜比剧院举行，保罗·托马斯·安德森执导的《一战再战》（One Battle after Another）成为本届最大赢家，共斩获最佳影片、最佳导演、最佳男配角（肖恩·潘）、最佳改编剧本、最佳剪辑、最佳选角共 6 项大奖。

The film received a total of 13 nominations and ultimately led with an overwhelming advantage. 该片共获得 13 项提名，最终以压倒性优势领跑。

Ryan Coogler's "Sinners," starring Michael B. Jordan, also had a successful night, taking home 4 awards from a record-breaking 16 nominations: Best Actor, Best Original Screenplay (Coogler), Best Cinematography (Autumn Durald Arkapaw), and Best Original Score (Ludwig Göransson). 瑞恩·库格勒执导、迈克尔·B·乔丹主演的《罪人》（Sinners）同样收获颇丰，凭借创纪录的 16 项提名拿下最佳男主角、最佳原创剧本（库格勒）、最佳摄影（Autumn Durald Arkapaw）及最佳原创配乐（Ludwig Göransson）4 项奖项。

In the acting categories, Jessie Buckley won Best Actress for "Hamnet," and Amy Madigan won Best Supporting Actress for "Weapons." 表演奖项方面，杰西·巴克利凭借《哈姆奈特》（Hamnet）夺得最佳女主角，Amy Madigan 凭《凶器》（Weapons）获最佳女配角。

Guillermo del Toro's "Frankenstein" swept the technical and artistic awards, taking home Best Costume Design, Best Makeup and Hairstyling, and Best Production Design. 吉尔莫·德尔·托罗执导的《弗兰肯斯坦》（Frankenstein）则横扫技术与美术类奖项，包揽最佳服装设计、最佳化妆与发型设计以及最佳艺术指导三项。

The complete list compiled by Sina Film is as follows: 完整榜单由新浪电影整理如下：

    Best Picture: "One Battle after Another"

    Best Director: Paul Thomas Anderson, "One Battle after Another"

    Best Actress: Jessie Buckley, "Hamnet"

    Best Actor: Michael B. Jordan, "Sinners"

    Best Supporting Actress: Amy Madigan, "Weapons"

    Best Supporting Actor: Sean Penn, "One Battle after Another"

    Best Visual Effects: "Avatar 3"

    Best Sound: "F1: Turbo Racers"

    Best Original Score: "Sinners"

    Best Original Song: Golden - "K-POP: Demon Huntress Group"

    Best Cinematography: "Sinners"

    Best Editing: "One Battle after Another"

    Best Art Direction: "Frankenstein"

    Best Adapted Screenplay: "All Quiet on the Western Front"

    Best Original Screenplay: "The Sinner"

    Best Casting: "All Quiet on the Western Front"

    Best Costume Design: "Frankenstein"

    Best Makeup & Hairstyling: "Frankenstein"

    Best International Film: "Emotional Value"

    Best Documentary Feature: "Mr. Anonymous Against Putin"

    Best Documentary Short: "The Quiet Room as Witness"

    Best Live Action Short: "The Singers" & "Two People Exchanging Saliva"

    Best Animated Short: "The Girl Whose Tears Became Pearls"

    Best Animated Feature: "K-POP: Demon Hunters"

item.title: 《真人快打 2》定档 5 月 8 日
item.guid: 《真人快打-2》定档-5-月-8-日
item.description:
The R-rated action film "Mortal Kombat 2," adapted from a video game, has officially announced its release date for May 8th, simultaneously with North America. 游戏改编 R 级动作片《真人快打 2》正式宣布定档 5 月 8 日，与北美同步。

The film tells the story of washed-up Hollywood actor Johnny Cage, who is unexpectedly chosen to join a deadly martial arts tournament that will decide the fate of Earth. 影片讲述过气好莱坞演员强尼·凯奇意外被选中，加入一场决定地球命运的生死格斗争霸赛的故事。

item.title: 巴西片《密探》定档 3 月 27 日
item.guid: 巴西片《密探》定档-3-月-27-日
item.description:
The Brazilian film "The Secret Agent" has announced its release date for March 27th. The film is directed by Kleber Mendonça Filho and stars Wagner Moura. 巴西影片《密探》宣布定档 3 月 27 日。影片由小克莱伯·门多萨执导，瓦格纳·马拉主演。

The story is set during the peak of Brazil's military dictatorship in the 1970s, following former government technocrat Marcelo as he embarks on a journey of escape during Carnival, attempting to return home and reunite with his estranged son, only to find himself trapped in a city filled with violence and political frenzy. 故事背景设定于 1970 年代巴西军事独裁统治的高峰时期，讲述前政府技术专家 Marcelo 在狂欢节期间踏上逃亡之旅，试图回到家乡与关系疏远的儿子重聚，却身陷一座充斥着暴力与政治狂欢的城市之中。
